extraction.one_line_summary: GROENEWEGEN won stage 2 via late selection in crosswinds, sprinting from 7-rider group after Sky controlled split with 10km remaining
tactical_patterns: Sky positioned ROWE, BERNAL, KWIATKOWSKI to force 7-rider selection at 10km mark in crosswind finish rather than pure sprint
GALLOPIN, BARDET, NAESEN prioritized intermediate sprint points over GC positioning, revealing unclear leadership hierarchy at AG2R-La Mondiale
JUNGELS and YATES both isolated when crosswinds split field under 25km, suggesting weak team support relative to GC ambitions

rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: positive: second consecutive stage win plus demonstrated ability to survive late crosswind selections unlike pure sprinters EWAN
rider_signals.ROWE Luke: positive: driving Sky's selection tactics on birthday suggests exceptional form and team leadership beyond domestique role
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: present in final 7-rider selection despite puncture under 50km demonstrates exceptional chase capacity
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: dropped when crosswinds split field under 25km, confirming vulnerability in tactical sprint finishes versus pure gallops
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: lost 7 minutes on flat stage, indicating poor team positioning or form crisis early in GC campaign
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: 14+ minutes lost on flat stage signals catastrophic form collapse or mechanical disaster
rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: negative: abandon via crash reveals fragility under crosswind pressure despite climbing pedigree
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: neutral: present in 7-rider selection and initiated sprint but comprehensively beaten, suggesting crosswind strength without finishing speed
